SEARCH
Package grafiosch.gtnet

Class GTNetStatusCheckService

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.GTNetStatusCheckService
@Service public class GTNetStatusCheckService extends Object
Single-peer GTNet status probe. Shared by the scheduled GTNetServerStatusCheckTask and the administrator-triggered POST /gtnet/{idGtNet}/checkstatus REST endpoint.

A peer is considered GTNetServerOnlineStatusTypes.SOS_ONLINE only when a ping round-trips successfully as a valid GTNet protocol response. TCP reachability alone is not sufficient: a reverse proxy or DuckDNS placeholder page can accept the connection and reply with an HTTP error while the GT application itself is down. Peers that cannot be probed because the outbound handshake is incomplete (gtNetConfig.tokenRemote is null) are marked GTNetServerOnlineStatusTypes.SOS_UNKNOWN rather than left at a stale status set by an inbound handshake message.

    checkAndUpdatePeer(GTNet peer, GTNet myGTNet)

    Resets a peer's online status to GTNetServerOnlineStatusTypes.SOS_UNKNOWN and closes all its GTNetEntity rows.

    • GTNetStatusCheckService

      public GTNetStatusCheckService()

  • Method Details

    • checkAndUpdatePeer

      @Transactional public GTNet checkAndUpdatePeer(GTNet peer, GTNet myGTNet)
      Pings peer from the identity of myGTNet and persists the resulting online and busy status, together with the per-entity serverState.

      Status decision:

      • BaseDataClient.SendResult.isDelivered() true → GTNetServerOnlineStatusTypes.SOS_ONLINE
      • BaseDataClient.SendResult.isDelivered() false → GTNetServerOnlineStatusTypes.SOS_OFFLINE (covers both network-unreachable and HTTP-error responses from a proxy)
      • Thrown exception when the previous status was ONLINE → SOS_OFFLINE
      Parameters:
      peer - the remote peer to probe; must have a completed outbound handshake (gtNetConfig.tokenRemote not null)
      myGTNet - the local GTNet entry used as the sender identity
      Returns:
      the (possibly updated and saved) peer entity

    • markUnverifiable

      @Transactional public GTNet markUnverifiable(GTNet peer)
      Resets a peer's online status to GTNetServerOnlineStatusTypes.SOS_UNKNOWN and closes all its GTNetEntity rows. Used when the outbound handshake is incomplete so a ping cannot be authenticated. Without this reset, a stale SOS_ONLINE written by an inbound handshake envelope would persist indefinitely.
      Parameters:
      peer - the remote peer whose status we cannot verify
      Returns:
      the (possibly updated and saved) peer entity
